title: Execution Plan
description: Ordered, engine-agnostic step list produced by the Artifact Generator from dependency_graph.execution_order. Consumed by both the Execute plan (which reads this file and prints steps one at a time, formatting its own display command from a step's fields) and the standalone engine/ runtime (which reads this file to sequence work, and each step's .sqlx file to know what to actually run). Deliberately contains no shell command or MCP invocation string — see docs/ASSUMPTIONS.md 'execution_plan.json is declarative'. Execute never derives ordering itself.

database.description: Which database this step runs against: buildspec.target_database for 'write', the Generate run's intermediate database for 'read'/'process'. Also recorded in the step's .sqlx file's own config block (references/sqlx-syntax-guide.md) — the engine cross-checks the two match rather than trusting either alone (engine/README.md 'Declared vs. observed database').
